name: 20_Car_Price_Prediction_RandomForest_CarPrices_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mradi wa utabiri wa bei za magari kwa kutumia mfano wa Random Forest na seti ya data ya Kaggle Car Prices? Pakia seti ya data na fanya uteuzi wa vipengele ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi alama ya R-squared, Mean Squared Error (MSE), na Mean Absolute Error (MAE) kwenye `results/metrics/results/metrics.txt`. Onyesha umuhimu wa vipengele na uhifadhi kwenye `results/figures/feature_importance.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya Markdown yenye ufahamu wa jinsi vipengele vilivyochaguliwa vinavyochangia katika utabiri wa bei za magari. Hifadhi ripoti kama `results/report.md`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Car Prices" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unatekelezwa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa urejeleaji wa "Random Forest" unatumika katika `src/model.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Alama ya "R-squared", "Mean Squared Error (MSE)," na "Mean Absolute Error (MAE)" zinahifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/results/metrics.txt`.
Umuhimu wa vipengele unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele unapaswa kuwa wa kina, kuhakikisha kwamba ni vipengele muhimu tu vinavyotumika katika mfano.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kutoa ufahamu wazi wa jinsi vipengele vilivyochaguliwa vinavyochangia katika utabiri wa bei za magari.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Car Prices" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is not met. Based on the provided code for `src/data_loader.py`, the `load_dataset()` function is merely a "minimal dataset loader placeholder" that returns a hardcoded dictionary instead of actually implementing the logic to load the "Kaggle Car Prices" dataset. Furthermore, the trajectory evidence confirms that actual execution attempts failed with a `FileNotFoundError` for `data/kaggle_car_prices.csv` and a `ValueError` due to column mismatches, indicating that the dataset was never successfully loaded into the system.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unatekelezwa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is not met because the provided code for `src/data_loader.py` contains only a minimal semantic placeholder and does not include any actual logic for feature selection. While the `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list within the file mentions that "Feature selection is implemented," the function `load_dataset()` merely returns a dictionary with a string note, and no algorithms (such as variance thresholds, correlation analysis, or model-based selection) are present in the source code. Although the trajectory evidence mentions environment feedback regarding "Feature Selection" and "Low Variance Warning," the actual code provided in the workspace for `src/data_loader.py` lacks the implementation to perform these tasks.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa urejeleaji wa "Random Forest" unatumika katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Kulingana na maudhui yaliyotolewa ya faili ya `src/model.py`, hakuna utekelezaji halisi wa mfano wa "Random Forest". Faili ina maelezo ya jumla (placeholder) na orodha ya maneno muhimu (`KEYWORDS = ["Random Forest"]`), lakini haina msimbo wa Python wa kuingiza (import) maktaba ya `sklearn.ensemble.RandomForestRegressor` wala mantiki ya kuunda mfano huo. Kazi ya `build_model()` inarudisha tu "model placeholder" badala ya mfano halisi wa urejeleaji wa Random Forest. Ingawa kumbukumbu ya mazingira (trajectory evidence) inadokeza utekelezaji uliofanikiwa, ushahidi wa msimbo uliowasilishwa hautoshelezi hitaji hili.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa maelezo ya mradi (Trajectory Evidence) yanadokeza kuwa uthibitishaji wa msalaba (cross-validation) ulifanyika, msimbo halisi uliotolewa katika `src/train.py` hauna utekelezaji wowote wa mbinu hiyo. Faili ya `src/train.py` ina kitendazi cha `train()` ambacho ni kitanzi rahisi cha `range(num_steps)` kinachojumlisha namba pekee, bila kuingiza maktaba kama `scikit-learn` (kwa mfano, `cross_val_score` au `KFold`) au mantiki yoyote ya kutathmini modeli kwa kutumia mgawanyo wa data. Msimbo uliopo ni wa kiwango cha chini sana (minimal semantic implementation) na haukidhi hitaji la kiufundi la kutekeleza uthibitishaji wa msalaba.

judge_stats.criteria: Alama ya "R-squared", "Mean Squared Error (MSE)," na "Mean Absolute Error (MAE)" zinahifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/results/metrics.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa kumbukumbu ya utekelezaji (trajectory evidence) inadai kuwa mchakato wa kuhifadhi metriki ulifanikiwa, maudhui halisi ya faili ya `results/metrics/results/metrics.txt` yaliyotolewa kwenye [Key Evidence] yanaonyesha neno `'placeholder\r\n'` pekee. Hakuna alama za R-squared, Mean Squared Error (MSE), wala Mean Absolute Error (MAE) zilizorekodiwa ndani ya faili hiyo kama inavyotakiwa na kigezo.

judge_stats.criteria: Umuhimu wa vipengele unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Ushahidi kutoka kwenye muundo wa mradi (Project Tree) unaonyesha kuwa faili la `results/figures/feature_importance.png` lipo kwenye saraka husika. Aidha, kumbukumbu ya utekelezaji (Trajectory Evidence) inathibitisha kuwa amri ya kuhifadhi picha hiyo ilitekelezwa kwa mafanikio (exit code 0) bila hitilafu yoyote ya maktaba za picha kama Matplotlib. Ingawa kuna hitilafu ya kiufundi wakati wa kusoma picha hiyo kwa ajili ya uhakiki wa AI (BadRequestError), ushahidi wa mazingira ya mfumo unathibitisha kuwa mchakato wa kutengeneza na kuhifadhi grafu ya umuhimu wa vipengele ulikamilika kama ilivyokusudiwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa muundo wa mradi (Project Tree) unaonyesha kuwa faili ya `results/report.md` ipo, maudhui ya faili hiyo yaliyotolewa katika ushahidi (Key Evidence) ni `('placeholder', None)`. Hii inaashiria kuwa faili haijajazwa na matokeo halisi ya uchambuzi, takwimu, au vielelezo vinavyohitajika, bali ina kishika-nafasi (placeholder) tu. Licha ya trajekta kuonyesha kuwa mchakato wa uandishi ulifanyika bila hitilafu ya kiufundi, lengo la kutoa ripoti kamili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo halijafikiwa kulingana na maudhui yaliyowasilishwa.
